violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Boxes on the floor of the walk in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Several containers in the refrigerator and walk in cooler not date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Blade on the large can opener needs cleaned. Inside of ice machine needs cleaned.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Wall and/or ceiling covering material was not light colored as required. -Dark colored ceiling tiles in the kitchen.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
